results.title: Jaime Guevara: el pincel libertario de Santander
results.description: Un artista que supera las siete décadas y que con disciplina y constancia inicia su rutina diaria con un pincel y un café, ya comienza a hablar claramente de una persona dotada a más de talento, de dos componentes que marcan la diferencia.

results.title: Murat Yakin’s Swiss watch has perfect villain energy
results.description: Somehow, Switzerland's manager has gone viral for just being his good-looking, well put together self. Amid all the attention sits a striking piece of horology from an independent Swiss watchmaker you need to know more about

results.title: Spain edges Belgium and will face France in World Cup semifinal
results.description: Spain and France will meet Tuesday in Arlington, Texas, in a matchup anticipated for years. Neither team has lost at this year's World Cup.

results.title: India-New Zealand Sign 10 MoUs During PM Modi’s Visit; Set $7 Billion Trade Target By 2030
results.description: India and New Zealand signed 10 MoUs during PM Modi's visit and agreed to double bilateral trade to 7 billion US dollars by 2030. The two countries also decided to strengthen cooperation in defence, maritime security and counter-terrorism. The post India-New Zealand Sign 10 MoUs During PM Modi’s Visit; Set $7 Billion Trade Target By 2030 appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
